# Manis Bill Application - Copilot Instructions

This is a bill generator website for milk delivery management where users can:
- Add weekly milk amounts
- View all weekly records
- Download weekly bills for customers

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Details

**Tech Stack**: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript (No build process required)
**Purpose**: Weekly milk bill generator with record storage
**Key Features**:
- Weekly milk amount input
- Weekly record storage and retrieval via browser LocalStorage
- Bill generation and download (PDF)
- Customer bill management
- Responsive design
- No installation or dependencies required

## Implementation Complete

The application has been fully implemented with:
- Modern UI with gradient design
- Form validation
- Local data persistence
- PDF export functionality (using html2pdf library from CDN)
- CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
- Summary statistics dashboard
- Mobile-responsive layout
